hero.title: Antalya Airport VIP Transfer
hero.subtitle: Start your holiday with a luxurious, safe, and professional transfer service.

booking.title: Book Your Transfer
booking.subtitle: Book your VIP airport transfer in 3 easy steps.

booking.notesPlaceholder: Any special requests or additional info...
booking.errorFillReturn: Please fill return date and time
booking.seoSubheading: Safe, comfortable, and punctual VIP airport transfer from Antalya Airport to all resort destinations.
booking.seoFlightTrackingDesc: We track your flight in real-time. Your driver will be waiting even if your flight is delayed.
booking.seoInsuredDesc: All our vehicles are fully licensed and covered by comprehensive insurance.
booking.seoSecurePaymentDesc: SSL-encrypted, secure credit card payment via Stripe infrastructure.
booking.seo247Desc: Reach us via WhatsApp or phone before, during, and after your flight.
booking.seoDoorToDoorDesc: Private VIP transfer from the airport exit straight to your hotel doorstep.
booking.seoNoHiddenDesc: The price you see at booking is the price you pay. No surprises.
booking.seoFaq1Q: How does Antalya Airport transfer work?
booking.seoFaq1A: After booking online, your flight is tracked. When you land, your driver greets you with a name sign and takes you directly to your hotel.
booking.seoFaq2A: Yes, you can cancel for free up to 24 hours before your transfer. Full refund is provided.
booking.seoFaq3A: We offer VIP transfers to Belek, Kemer, Alanya, Side, Lara, Kundu, Kaş, Manavgat, Konyaaltı and many more.
booking.seoFaq4Q: Is there an extra charge for night flights?
booking.seoFaq4A: A 15% night surcharge applies for flights between 22:00-06:00. This is automatically calculated during booking.
booking.seoTextBlock: VELORA Transfer offers premium VIP transfer service between Antalya Airport (AYT) and all resort destinations including Belek, Kemer, Side, Alanya, Lara, Kundu, Kaş, and Manavgat. Travel in comfort and safety with our Mercedes Vito fleet. Online booking, Stripe secure payment, free cancellation and 24/7 support.

trust.heading: Why travelers choose Velora.
trust.subheading: Premium airport transfer service trusted by thousands of travelers visiting the Turkish Riviera every year.
trust.licensedDesc: All vehicles are fully licensed, regularly inspected and carry comprehensive insurance for your complete peace of mind.
trust.punctualDesc: We monitor your flight in real-time. Your driver will be waiting, no matter if your flight is early or delayed.
trust.doorToDoorDesc: From Antalya Airport directly to your hotel, villa, or any address across the Turkish Riviera.
trust.conciergeDesc: Multilingual support team available around the clock. Reach us via phone, email, or WhatsApp anytime.
trust.pricingDesc: No hidden fees, no surge pricing. The price you see at booking is the price you pay. Period.
trust.flightDesc: We track every flight landing at Antalya Airport so your driver is always perfectly timed with your arrival.

howItWorks.heading: Book in three simple steps.
howItWorks.subheading: Getting from Antalya Airport to your destination has never been easier.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select your pickup location, destination, travel date and number of passengers through our simple booking form.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Review your trip details, select any extras like child seats, and complete your secure payment online.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your professional driver will be waiting at the airport with a name sign. Sit back, relax and enjoy the journey.

vehicle.heading: Travel in comfort.
vehicle.subheading: Every transfer is made in our Mercedes Vito VIP fleet — spacious, immaculate, and equipped with everything you need for a relaxing journey from the airport to your destination.

testimonials.heading: Loved by travelers.
testimonials.subheading: Read what our passengers say about their Velora transfer experience.
testimonials.review1Text: Absolutely seamless experience. Driver was already waiting when we landed, vehicle was spotless. Best airport transfer service I've used anywhere in the world.
testimonials.review2Text: We were a family of five with lots of luggage. The Mercedes Vito was incredibly spacious and comfortable. Kids loved the Wi-Fi. Will definitely book again.
testimonials.review3Text: Our flight was delayed by two hours and the driver was still there, no extra charge. That kind of reliability is rare. Highly recommended.

cta.heading: Ready for a stress-free arrival?
cta.subheading: Book your private airport transfer now and start your holiday the moment you land in Antalya.

about.title: About
about.heading: About VELORA Transfer
about.subtitle: Premium VIP airport transfer service in Antalya, Turkey
about.paragraph1: VELORA Transfer provides first-class VIP private transfer service from Antalya Airport to all popular holiday destinations across the Turkish Riviera. With our professional drivers and luxury Mercedes Vito VIP vehicles, we guarantee comfortable, safe, and punctual transfers.
about.paragraph2: Serving 400+ regions, we offer fixed price guarantee, 24/7 customer support, and secure online payment. Our mission is to turn every transfer into an unforgettable experience.
about.feature1Desc: No hidden fees: the price you see is the price you pay. All transfers include taxes and waiting time.
about.feature2Desc: Your booking is confirmed instantly. Driver details and QR code welcome details are sent via email.
about.feature3Desc: 24/7 support in Turkish, English, German, Polish and Russian. We're here to help whenever you need us.
about.feature4Desc: All our vehicles are regularly inspected, licensed and carry comprehensive passenger insurance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help 24/7.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.checkFaq: Check our FAQ for quick answers

faq.title: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our VIP transfer service
faq.q1: How can I make a reservation?
faq.a1: You can make an online reservation in seconds by selecting your region, date, and time on our website. Payment is processed securely via Stripe.
faq.q2: How will my driver find me at the airport?
faq.a2: Your driver will be waiting at the arrivals hall with a name board. After booking, you'll receive an email with driver details and a QR code.
faq.q3: What happens if my flight is delayed?
faq.a3: We track all flights in real-time. If your flight is delayed, your driver waits for free.
faq.a4: All our transfers are made with Mercedes Vito VIP vehicles featuring leather seats, Wi-Fi, climate control, and capacity for up to 7 passengers.
faq.a5: No, our prices are per vehicle. Up to 7 passengers can travel in a single Mercedes Vito at the same price.
faq.a6: Yes, free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before your scheduled departure time.
faq.a7: Yes, we provide free child seats. Please request during booking.
faq.a8: You can pay securely with credit or debit card. Payments are processed via Stripe infrastructure, PCI DSS compliant.
faq.q9: Is there an extra charge for night transfers?
faq.a9: A 15% night surcharge applies to transfers with pickup between 22:00–06:00. This is automatically calculated during booking.
faq.q10: What is the meet & greet service?
faq.a10: Your driver will greet you at the arrivals hall with a sign bearing your name and accompany you with your luggage to the vehicle.
faq.q11: Which regions do you provide transfers to?
faq.a11: We offer transfer services from Antalya Airport to Belek, Side, Alanya, Kemer, Kaş, Fethiye, Marmaris and 25+ regions.
faq.q12: I have a late-night flight, is a transfer possible?
faq.a12: Yes, we offer 24/7 transfer service. Your driver will be ready and waiting for night flights as well.
faq.stillNeedHelpDesc: Our team is available 24/7 to assist you with any questions about your transfer.

regionDetail.defaultDesc: Book your VIP private transfer from Antalya Airport to {name}. Professional drivers, Mercedes Vito VIP vehicles, fixed prices with no hidden fees.
regionDetail.fixedPriceDesc: No surge pricing, no hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay.
regionDetail.proDriversDesc: Licensed, experienced drivers with excellent knowledge of the region.
regionDetail.flightTrackDesc: We monitor your flight. If it's delayed, your driver waits for free.
regionDetail.securePayDesc: Pay securely with Stripe. Free cancellation up to 24 hours before.
regionDetail.bookDesc: Premium door-to-door VIP transfer with Mercedes Vito. All-inclusive pricing with meet & greet at the airport.
regionDetail.mercedesVito: Mercedes Vito VIP with leather seats
regionDetail.faqQ1: How long is the transfer from Antalya Airport to {name}?
regionDetail.faqA1: The transfer from Antalya Airport to {name} takes approximately {duration} minutes ({distance} km).
regionDetail.faqQ2: What vehicle is used for the {name} transfer?
regionDetail.faqA2: We use Mercedes Vito VIP vehicles with leather interior, Wi-Fi, climate control, and space for up to 7 passengers.
regionDetail.faqQ3: Can I cancel my {name} transfer booking?
regionDetail.faqA3: Yes, free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before your transfer. After that, a 50% fee applies.
regionDetail.faqQ4: How will my driver find me at the airport?
regionDetail.faqA4: Your driver will meet you at the arrivals hall with a name board. You'll receive driver details and a QR code after booking.
regionDetail.faqQ5: How much does a private transfer from Antalya Airport to {name} cost?
regionDetail.faqA5: Prices start from ${price} per vehicle (not per person) for a one-way VIP transfer. The price is fixed with no hidden fees, tolls, or night surcharges included.
regionDetail.faqQ6: Is there a night transfer service from Antalya Airport to {name}?
regionDetail.faqA6: Yes, VELORA offers 24/7 transfer service including late-night and early-morning flights. A small night surcharge may apply between 22:00 and 06:00.
regionDetail.faqQ7: Can I book a child seat for my {name} airport transfer?
regionDetail.faqA7: Yes, child seats are available free of charge. Simply select the child seat option when booking your transfer.
regionDetail.faqQ8: How much luggage can I bring on the {name} transfer?
regionDetail.faqA8: Our Mercedes Vito VIP vehicles accommodate up to 7 large suitcases. If you have extra or oversized luggage, please mention it in the booking notes.
regionDetail.readyDesc: Fixed price, professional drivers, meet & greet at the airport.
regionDetail.aboutDescDefault: {name} is one of the most popular holiday destinations in Antalya. Located just {duration} minutes from Antalya Airport, {name} welcomes thousands of tourists every year. With VELORA VIP transfer service, you can travel from the airport to {name} in comfort, safety, and at a fixed price.
regionDetail.imageAlt: VIP transfer from Antalya Airport to {name}

footer.description: VIP private transfer service from Antalya Airport to all regions.

terms.title: Legal
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services.
terms.s1Text: VELORA Transfer provides private VIP airport transfer services from Antalya Airport (AYT) to various destinations in the Antalya region. Our service includes door-to-door transfer with professional drivers and premium Mercedes-Benz vehicles.
terms.s2Items: All prices are displayed in USD and are per-vehicle, not per-person|Payment is required at the time of booking via secure online payment (Stripe)|A confirmation email with booking details will be sent upon successful payment|Your booking is confirmed only after payment is received
terms.s3Items: Maximum 7 passengers per VIP Mercedes Vito|Maximum 7 pieces of standard luggage|Child seats are provided free of charge upon request|Passengers must provide accurate flight information for airport pickups
terms.s4Items: For airport pickups, our driver will meet you at the arrivals hall with a name board|We track your flight and adjust pickup time for early/late arrivals|Free waiting time: 60 minutes after flight landing for airport pickups|For hotel pickups, the driver will wait at the specified location
terms.s5Text: A 15% surcharge applies to transfers with pickup times between 22:00 and 06:00. This is automatically calculated during booking.
terms.s6Items: Free cancellation: Up to 24 hours before the scheduled pickup time|Late cancellation: Cancellations within 24 hours of pickup may be subject to a 50% charge|No-show: 100% of the transfer fee will be charged
terms.s6Extra: See our full Cancellation Policy for details.
terms.s7Text: VELORA Transfer is not liable for delays caused by traffic conditions, road closures, weather conditions, or other circumstances beyond our control. We carry comprehensive insurance for all passengers during the transfer.
terms.s8Text: Changes to booking details (date, time, destination) are subject to availability and may incur additional charges if the new route has a different price. Contact us at least 12 hours before the transfer.
terms.s9Text: For questions about these terms, contact us at

privacy.title: Legal
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.s1Text: When you use VELORA Transfer services, we collect the following personal information necessary to process your transfer booking:
privacy.s1Items: Full name|Email address|Phone number|Flight details|Hotel/accommodation information|Payment information (processed securely via Stripe)
privacy.s2Text: We use your personal data to:
privacy.s2Items: Process and confirm your transfer booking|Communicate pickup details and updates|Assign a driver and vehicle to your transfer|Process payments securely|Send booking confirmation and receipt|Improve our services
privacy.s3Text: We share your information only with:
privacy.s3Items: Assigned drivers: Name, phone, pickup location, and flight details necessary for the transfer|Stripe: Payment processing (PCI DSS compliant)
privacy.s3Extra: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.s4Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including SSL encryption, secure database storage, and access controls.
privacy.s5Text: We retain your booking data for up to 2 years for operational and legal compliance purposes. Payment data is handled by Stripe and subject to their retention policy.
privacy.s6Items: Access your personal data|Request correction of inaccurate data|Request deletion of your data|Object to processing of your data|Data portability
privacy.s7Text: We use essential cookies for language preference, currency selection, and session management. See our Cookie Policy for details.
privacy.s8Text: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at

cookies.title: Legal
cookies.heading: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies on our website.
cookies.s1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the website remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.
cookies.s2aText: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
cookies.s2aItems: Language preference: Remembers your selected language (TR, EN, DE, PL, RU)|Currency preference: Remembers your selected display currency (USD, EUR, TRY)|Session cookies: Maintains your session during the booking process
cookies.s2bText: When you proceed to payment, Stripe may set cookies necessary for secure payment processing. These are managed by Stripe and subject to their cookie policy.
cookies.s3Text: We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. We do not share your browsing data with advertising networks.
cookies.s4Text: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of the booking system. Most browsers allow you to:
cookies.s4Items: View cookies stored on your device|Delete specific or all cookies|Block cookies from specific or all sites|Set preferences for first-party and third-party cookies
cookies.s5Text: For questions about our cookie practices, email

cancellation.title: Legal
cancellation.heading: Cancellation & Refund Policy
cancellation.subtitle: Our fair cancellation policy for customers and drivers.
cancellation.intro: We understand plans can change. Our cancellation policy is designed to be fair for both our customers and our drivers.
cancellation.s1Text: Cancel up to 24 hours before your scheduled pickup time for a full refund.
cancellation.s2Text: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before pickup are subject to a 50% cancellation fee.
cancellation.s2Extra: This fee covers driver scheduling and vehicle reservation costs.
cancellation.s3Text: If you do not show up for your transfer without prior cancellation, 100% of the transfer fee will be charged.
cancellation.s4Items: We track all flights. If your flight is delayed, your driver will wait at no extra charge.|If your flight is cancelled, contact us immediately. We will reschedule or provide a full refund.
cancellation.s5Items: WhatsApp: Message us with your reservation code|Email: Send your cancellation request to info@veloratransfer.com
cancellation.s5Extra: Please include your reservation code (VL-XXXXXX) in all cancellation requests.
cancellation.s6Items: Refunds are processed to the original payment method|Processing time: 5-10 business days depending on your bank|You will receive an email confirmation when the refund is initiated
cancellation.s7Text: Need to change your booking? Contact us at least 12 hours before your transfer. Changes to date, time, or destination are subject to availability and may incur price differences if the new route has a different rate.

bookingSuccess.title: Payment Successful!
bookingSuccess.description: Your VIP transfer has been booked. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
bookingSuccess.saveCode: Save this code — you'll need it for any inquiries about your transfer.
bookingSuccess.step1: You will receive a confirmation email with your transfer details and QR code.
bookingSuccess.step2: A driver will be assigned to your transfer. You will be notified via WhatsApp.
bookingSuccess.step3: Your driver will be waiting for you at Antalya Airport arrivals with a name board.

bookingCancel.title: Payment Cancelled
bookingCancel.description: Your payment was not completed. No charge has been made. You can try again or contact our support team.

homeFaq.heading: Common Questions
homeFaq.subheading: Everything you need to know about our transfer service
homeFaq.q1: How does Antalya Airport transfer work?
homeFaq.a1: Book online, we track your flight and greet you at the airport with a name sign. Then we drive you directly to your hotel or address.
homeFaq.q2: How much does a transfer cost?
homeFaq.a2: Prices vary by destination. Starting from $35 to Kundu-Lara, $40 to Belek, $55 to Side, $75 to Alanya. All prices include vehicle, driver, fuel and insurance.
homeFaq.q3: What if my flight is delayed?
homeFaq.a3: We track your flight in real-time. In case of delay, your driver will continue waiting at no extra charge.
homeFaq.q4: What vehicles are used for transfers?
homeFaq.a4: We serve with Mercedes Vito VIP vehicles equipped with Wi-Fi, AC, USB charging, complimentary water and leather seats.
homeFaq.a5: Yes, you can request a child seat during booking. It is provided free of charge.
homeFaq.a6: You can pay securely online with a credit card. All cards are accepted through Stripe payment infrastructure.

localSeo.heading: Antalya Airport VIP Transfer Service
localSeo.paragraph1: VELORA Transfer provides professional VIP transfer service from Antalya Airport (AYT) to all resort destinations including Belek, Side, Alanya, Kemer, Kundu-Lara, Kas, Fethiye, Marmaris and surrounding areas. 24/7 service, flight tracking and fixed price guarantee for a comfortable travel experience.
localSeo.paragraph2: Our Antalya airport transfer service is provided with licensed and insured vehicles. Our Mercedes Vito VIP vehicles feature Wi-Fi, air conditioning, USB charging ports and complimentary water. Our professional drivers speak English, German and Russian.
localSeo.paragraph3: Belek golf hotel transfer, Side ancient city transfer, Alanya coastal area transfer, Kemer nature resort transfer — fast and safe access to all popular Antalya holiday destinations. Private door-to-door transfer from the airport to your hotel or from your hotel to the airport.

kvkk.title: GDPR / KVKK
kvkk.heading: Data Protection Policy
kvkk.subtitle: Information about how we protect and process your personal data.
kvkk.s1Text: VELORA Transfer, operating from Antalya, Turkey, is the data controller responsible for processing your personal data in accordance with KVKK (Law No. 6698) and GDPR.
kvkk.s2Text: We collect and process the following personal data:
kvkk.s2Items: Name, surname, and contact information (phone, email)|Passport or ID details for airport transfers|Flight information and travel dates|Payment information (processed securely via Stripe)|IP address and browser data for website security
kvkk.s3Text: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
kvkk.s3Items: To provide and manage your transfer service|To communicate booking confirmations and updates|To process payments securely|To comply with legal obligations|To improve our services and customer experience
kvkk.s4Text: Your personal data is retained for the minimum period necessary to fulfill the purposes described above, and in compliance with applicable legal requirements. Booking data is kept for 5 years in accordance with tax and commercial legislation.
kvkk.s5Text: Under KVKK and GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
kvkk.s5Items: Right to access your personal data|Right to request correction of inaccurate data|Right to request deletion of your data|Right to object to data processing|Right to data portability|Right to withdraw consent at any time
kvkk.s6Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All payment data is processed through PCI-DSS compliant Stripe infrastructure.
kvkk.s7Text: For questions regarding your personal data or to exercise your rights, please contact us at info@veloratransfer.com or call +90 543 145 15 48.
